response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified two distinct musical performances. For the first song, the on-screen text 'OFFSIDE' was present. I searched for 'OFFSIDE Japanese and English lyrics' and confirmed it's a song by Dannie May. For the second song, the on-screen text 'Deal with the devil' and '作詞・作曲: ryo (supercell)' appeared. I searched for 'Deal with the devil ryo Japanese and English lyrics' and confirmed it is a well-known song composed by ryo (supercell). I have included the requested lyrics in the JSON.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performance by a virtual character on stage, featuring "OFFSIDE" by Dannie May and "Deal with the devil" by ryo (supercell).
